name: ExtensionSupplyRequest_BasedOn
title: R5: What other request is fulfilled by this supply request (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SupplyRequest.basedOn` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SupplyRequest.basedOn` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SupplyRequest.basedOn` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SupplyRequest.basedOn` has a context of SupplyRequest based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `SupplyRequest`.
Element `SupplyRequest.basedOn` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
